title: Decoding the obfuscated bash script on a Uniqlo t-shirt
summary: This article analyzes an obfuscated bash script found on a Uniqlo t-shirt, which was actually a self-evaluating script served by Akamai's CDN to consumers in retail stores. It decodes the script's purpose, revealing it as a creative, real-world example of obfuscated code used for promotional or tracking purposes.
